label: reasoning channel • exact-output instruction lands on the visible channel
query: Reply with exactly the single word BANANA in capital letters. No punctuation, no explanation, nothing else.
notes: Tightest possible visible-channel pin: a reasoning model may deliberate as much as it likes on the hidden channel, but the visible channel must carry exactly the requested token — a model that leaks deliberation into visible text fails visibleMustNotContain on obvious deliberation phrases. Off-CI (needs a model).
